agents.name: browser_agent
agents.description: DuckDuckGo search and webpage retrieval plugin

actions.name: fetch_page
actions.example_output_summary: Page title, extracted text, HTML, links, and images

actions.name: web_search
actions.example_output_summary: List of search results with title, url, and snippet

suggested_use_cases: Search the web via DuckDuckGo
Fetch and extract text from a webpage
Extract links or images from a page
Crawl a website's pages
Check if a URL is reachable
Research a topic across multiple queries

agents.name: file_agent
agents.description: File system and document access plugin

actions.name: list_directory
actions.example_output_summary: Lists of folders and files with metadata in the directory

actions.name: read_text_file
actions.example_output_summary: The text content of the file

suggested_use_cases: List files and folders in a directory
Read text files, PDFs, Excel, Word, or PowerPoint
Search for files by name pattern
Get file metadata (size, dates)
Read multiple files at once
avoid_use_cases: Accessing network drives or cloud storage

agents.name: gmail_agent

actions.name: count_emails
actions.description: Return the estimated number of emails matching a Gmail query.

actions.name: get_attachments
actions.description: Return emails that have attachments, with attachment metadata.

actions.name: get_drafts
actions.description: Return draft emails.

actions.name: get_email_by_id
actions.description: Return a single full email (with body and attachments) by message ID.

actions.name: get_important_emails
actions.description: Return emails marked Important.

actions.name: get_latest_emails
actions.description: Return the most recent inbox emails.
actions.example_output_summary: List of 5 most recent inbox emails with id, from, to, subject, date, snippet

actions.name: get_sent_emails
actions.description: Return sent emails.

actions.name: get_starred_emails
actions.description: Return starred emails.

actions.name: get_unread_emails
actions.description: Return unread emails.

actions.name: search_date_range
actions.description: Return emails within an inclusive ``start_date``..``end_date`` range.

actions.name: search_gmail_query
actions.description: Return emails matching a raw Gmail search query string.

actions.name: search_sender
actions.description: Return emails from a given sender.
actions.example_output_summary: List of emails from the specified sender

actions.name: search_subject
actions.description: Return emails whose subject matches the given text.

suggested_use_cases: Check for unread emails
Search emails by sender or subject
Get email count matching a query
Retrieve email details including body and attachments
List starred or important emails
Search emails within a date range

agents.name: memory_agent
agents.description: Long-term memory management — store, search, and retrieve memories
suggested_use_cases: Store information for long-term recall
Search past conversations or stored memories
Retrieve specific memory details
Update or delete existing memories
Archive the current chat and start fresh
Create a summary of the current conversation

agents.name: news_agent

actions.name: get_category_news
actions.description: Top headlines for a specific category and country.

actions.name: get_latest_news
actions.description: Latest top headlines for a country (defaults to ``us``).

actions.name: get_source_news
actions.description: Top headlines from a specific source (e.g. ``bbc-news``).

actions.name: get_sources
actions.description: List available NewsAPI sources (optionally filtered).

actions.name: search_combined
actions.description: Aggregate news across topics, categories, and sources in one request.

actions.name: search_date_range
actions.description: Search articles for a query within a date range (``YYYY-MM-DD``).

actions.name: search_multiple_queries
actions.description: Fetch news for several queries, grouped by query.

actions.name: search_multiple_topics
actions.description: Fetch news for several topics, grouped by topic.

actions.name: search_news
actions.description: Search all articles for a single query.
actions.example_output_summary: List of news articles matching the query

actions.name: top_headlines
actions.description: Top headlines for a country (optionally filtered by category).
actions.example_output_summary: List of top technology headlines in the US

suggested_use_cases: Get top headlines for a country or category
Search news articles by keyword
Compare news across multiple topics
Find news from a specific source
Get news within a date range
avoid_use_cases: Historical news older than 30 days (API limit)

agents.name: notes_generator_agent

actions.name: generate_notes
actions.example_output_summary: Generated notes file path, word count, and page count

actions.name: generate_presentation
actions.example_output_summary: Generated PPTX file path with requested number of slides

suggested_use_cases: Generate comprehensive study notes on any topic
Create exam preparation materials
Generate presentations (PPTX)
Create professional reports
Generate notes from a source file (PDF, DOCX)

agents.name: project_tracker_agent

actions.name: create_project
actions.example_output_summary: The newly created project with generated id and empty sub-collections

actions.name: get_project_dashboard
actions.example_output_summary: Summary counts: todos, milestones, risks, notes, meetings, etc.

suggested_use_cases: Create and manage projects with notes, todos, milestones
Record meetings, decisions, and risks
Track project progress with updates
Search across all projects
Get a project dashboard summary
avoid_use_cases: Integration with Jira, Linear, or GitHub Issues

agents.name: todo_agent

actions.name: add_todo
actions.example_output_summary: The newly created todo with generated id and timestamps

actions.name: list_pending_todos
actions.example_output_summary: List of all todos with status 'pending'

suggested_use_cases: Add, update, complete, or delete todos
List all, pending, or completed todos
Search todos by keyword or tag
Bulk add or complete multiple todos
Get todo statistics

agents.name: weather_agent

actions.name: compare_locations
actions.description: Current weather for multiple locations side by side (no ranking).

actions.name: current_weather
actions.description: Current weather for a single location.
actions.example_output_summary: Current temperature, humidity, wind, weather description for Bangalore

actions.name: daily_forecast
actions.description: Daily forecast for the next ``days`` days.
actions.example_output_summary: 7-day forecast with daily high/low temperatures and conditions

actions.name: hourly_forecast
actions.description: Hourly forecast for the next ``hours`` hours.

actions.name: search_location
actions.description: Geocode a location name to coordinates and metadata.

actions.name: weather_bulk_request
actions.description: Run several weather sub-requests in a single call.

actions.name: weather_by_coordinates
actions.description: Current weather for explicit latitude/longitude coordinates.

actions.name: weather_multiple_locations
actions.description: Current weather for multiple locations, grouped by location.

actions.name: weather_next_days
actions.description: The next ``days`` days (starting tomorrow).

actions.name: weather_today
actions.description: Current conditions plus today's daily forecast.

actions.name: weather_tomorrow
actions.description: Tomorrow's daily forecast.

suggested_use_cases: Get current weather for a location
Get hourly or daily forecast
Compare weather across multiple cities
Look up weather by coordinates
Check tomorrow's weather

agents.name: youtube_agent

actions.name: play_video
actions.example_output_summary: Opens the video in the default browser and returns video metadata

actions.name: search_videos
actions.example_output_summary: List of videos with title, channel, duration, view_count, url, thumbnail

suggested_use_cases: Search YouTube for videos
Get video details (title, duration, views)
Open a video in the browser
List videos from a channel or playlist
Get trending videos by country
